algorithm: Baseline GenRoute (same as Archive_extracted/main.go): GenSeq + RoutingTS; set NextSta/NextTime only when Cost>=0; if StaIndexesLen>=MAXSHIPS then mark infeasible.
Variant A: Same as baseline, but when StationsLen==0 keep NextTime at TimeCurrent (not -1).
Variant B: Same as baseline, but if Cost<0 then set NextSta to 0 and NextTime to TimeCurrent as safe defaults.
